Name: UPrimaryAssetLabel
Description: A seed file that is created to mark referenced assets as part of this primary asset

Variables.Name: Rules
Variables.Description: Management rules for this specific asset, if set it will override the type rules

Variables.Name: bLabelAssetsInMyDirectory
Variables.Description: True to Label everything in this directory and sub directories

Variables.Name: AssignedDirectories
Variables.Description: True to Label everything in this directory and sub directories

Variables.Name: bIsRuntimeLabel
Variables.Description: Set to true if the label asset itself should be cooked and available at runtime. This does not affect the assets that are labeled, they are set with cook rule

Variables.Name: ExplicitAssets
Variables.Description: List of manually specified assets to label

Variables.Name: ExplicitBlueprints
Variables.Description: List of manually specified blueprint assets to label

Variables.Name: AssetCollection
Variables.Description: Collection to load asset references out of

Variables.Name: DataTableAsExplicitAssets
Variables.Description: List of manually specified assets to label
